evidenceSnippetOriginal: Essays and other traditional assessments, such as quizzes and multiple-choice tests may be more vulnerable to AI misuse. An essay task with a generic or broad topic is quite vulnerable.
evidenceLocator: Section: Can I still ask students to complete essays, quizzes and multiple choice tests?
